root.rep_text: หนังสือแจ้งยอด

membership_no.nulltext: ต้องการดูแค่สมาชิก

root.sql:
select membership_no ,member_group_no ,(select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name ,'ผู้จัดการทั่วไป' as manager_position ,monthly_date ,member_name ,( 'เลขทะเบียนที่ ' || membership_no || ' สังกัด ' || member_group_no ) as mem_title ,decode ( '!check_address!' , '01' , ( select 'เลขที่ ' || address_no|| ' หมู่ ' || moo || ' ซอย ' || soi || ' ถนน ' || road || ' ต.' || tambol || ' อ.' || ( select district_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_district where province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code and district_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.district_code ) || ' จ.' || ( select province_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_province where province_code = sc_mem_m_member_address.province_code ) || ' ' || postcode from sc_mem_m_member_address where address_type ='0' and membership_no = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.membership_no )
,'' ) as address_title
,'!check_address!' as check_address
from sc_cls_mon_mem_shr where member_status_code = '0' and membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where deposit_balance > 0 and monthly_date = sc_cls_mon_mem_shr.monthly_date ) and monthly_date = '!monthly_date!' /*WHERE*/

r_book_share_loan_deposit_atdate_dep_nes.sql: select decode(tx.item_group_pre,tx.item_group_now,null,tx.item_group_now||'.') as item_group, tx.item_dep_no , tx.item_amount , tx.item_name from( select tm.item_group as item_group_now, lag(tm.item_group,1,0) over(order by tm.item_group) as item_group_pre, tm.item_dep_no, tm.item_name , tm.item_amount, sum(1) over(order by tm.item_dep_no) as row_no, floor((sum(1) over())/2) + mod((sum(1) over()),2) as row_mx from ( select 3 as item_group, null as loan_group_code, deposit_account_no as item_dep_no , deposit_account_name as item_name , deposit_balance as item_amount from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where close_status = '0' and monthly_date = '!monthly_date!' and membership_no = {0} order by deposit_account_no ) tm ) tx where tx.row_no <= tx.row_mx --where tx.row_no > tx.row_mx

select decode(tx.item_group_pre,tx.item_group_now,null,tx.item_group_now||'.') as item_group, tx.item_dep_no , tx.item_amount , tx.item_name from( select tm.item_group as item_group_now, lag(tm.item_group,1,0) over(order by tm.item_group) as item_group_pre, tm.item_dep_no, tm.item_name , tm.item_amount, sum(1) over(order by tm.item_dep_no) as row_no, floor((sum(1) over())/2) + mod((sum(1) over()),2) as row_mx from ( select 3 as item_group, null as loan_group_code, deposit_account_no as item_dep_no , deposit_account_name as item_name , deposit_balance as item_amount from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where close_status = '0' and monthly_date = '!monthly_date!' and membership_no = {0} order by deposit_account_no ) tm ) tx --where tx.row_no <= tx.row_mx where tx.row_no > tx.row_mx
select count(deposit_account_no) as c_account_no ,sum(deposit_balance) as s_dep_bal from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno where close_status = '0' and monthly_date = '!monthly_date!' and membership_no = {0}
